# The Kitchen

> Find recipes based on ingredients you already have. Plan meals, generate shopping lists, and discover cocktails, mocktails, and smoothies — all from your pantry.

The Kitchen is a free meal planning and recipe discovery app. Select the ingredients you have on hand and instantly see recipes you can make right now. Save favorites, build a weekly meal calendar, auto-generate aisle-organized shopping lists, and explore drinks from cocktails to wellness tonics.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Pick ingredients and find recipes you can make right now.
- [Pantry](/pantry): Save your baseline ingredients for faster recipe matching.
- [Install](/install): Install The Kitchen as an app on your phone or desktop.
- [Sign In](/auth): Create an account to sync saved recipes and meal plans across devices.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is collected, stored, and protected.

## Features

- Ingredient-based recipe matching with dynamic thresholds
- Weekly meal calendar with drag-and-drop planning
- Aisle-organized shopping lists from your meal plan
- Cocktails, mocktails, smoothies, and wellness drinks
- Recipe import from URLs (AllRecipes, Food Network, etc.)
- Hands-free cooking mode with step-by-step swipe UI and timers
- Offline support via PWA

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable pages.
